heading: Stevedoring and terminal services: vessels carrying cargo or passengers sponsored by military department
label: 2633 Stevedoring and terminal services: vessels carrying cargo or passengers sponsored by military department
notes: 1962ActSection 2633 is restated, without substantive change, to conform to the style adopted for title 10.

children.label: a
children.text: Notwithstanding , the Secretary of a military department may, under such regulations as he may prescribe, furnish stevedoring and terminal services and facilities to vessels carrying cargo, or passengers, or both, sponsored by his department.section 1301(a) of title 31

children.label: b
children.text: The furnishing of services and facilities under this section shall be at fair and reasonable rates.

children.label: c
children.text: The proceeds from furnishing services and facilities under this section shall be paid to the credit of the appropriation or fund out of which the services or facilities were supplied.
